# 格式：类型 x y 宽 高
player 391 536 40 40 999
wall 325 330 20 245 1
wall 0 310 345 20 1
wall 477 330 20 245 1
wall 477 310 345 20 1
wall 325 0 20 245 1
wall 0 245 345 20 1
wall 477 0 20 245 1
wall 477 245 345 20 1
tree 300 265 45 45 1
stone 477 265 45 45 1
door 345 0 132 40 1
hardwood 345 80 132 40 1
NPC 437 180 40 40 1 2
tpdoor 0 265 10 45 1
tpdoor 790 265 10 45 1
tpdoor 790 265 10 45 2
tpdoor 0 265 10 45 3
lake 0 100 400 400 2
NPC 500 280 40 40 3 1
#lake 400 300 50 50 1
